final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: interior design photography, editorial
Primary request: industrial-style café interior with raw concrete walls, exposed metal pipes, vintage leather sofas, and black-and-white photography on walls
Scene/backdrop: spacious café interior with high ceilings, large industrial windows letting in natural daylight, exposed structural elements
Subject: vintage brown leather Chesterfield sofas with worn patina, metal pipe fixtures running along concrete walls, framed black-and-white photography gallery wall
Style/medium: architectural interior photography, industrial loft aesthetic
Composition/framing: wide establishing shot showing seating area and window wall, natural perspective
Lighting/mood: soft natural daylight streaming through large windows, warm afternoon glow, moody yet inviting atmosphere mixing rough textures with cozy warmth
Color palette: cool gray concrete + warm brown leather + matte black metal + neutral cream/natural light tones
Materials/textures: rough unfinished concrete, aged leather with creases, brushed steel pipes, matte black frames, worn wooden floorboards
Constraints: preserve the balance between industrial rawness and refined comfort, keep natural light as primary source
Avoid: overly sterile spaces, plastic furniture, colorful neon signs, polished glossy surfaces, clutter
